'''fathadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dracontology|dracontology]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-th-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dracontology|dracontology]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fathadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæthædhæth|fæthædhæth]] || [[word:fæthædhæj|fæthædhæj]] || [[word:fæthædhæsh|fæthædhæsh]] || [[word:fæthædhæ|fæthædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fathathadhath|fathathadhath]] || [[word:fathathadhaj|fathathadhaj]] || [[word:fathathadhash|fathathadhash]] || [[word:fathathadha|fathathadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fathadhath|fathadhath]] || [[word:fathadhaj|fathadhaj]] || [[word:fathadhash|fathadhash]] || [[word:fathadha|fathadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fathafdhath|fathafdhath]] || [[word:fathafdhaj|fathafdhaj]] || [[word:fathafdhash|fathafdhash]] || [[word:fathafdhaf|fathafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fathadhatha|fathadhatha]] || [[word:fathadhaja|fathadhaja]] || [[word:fathadhasha|fathadhasha]] || [[word:fathadhaka|fathadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fathadhath|fathadhath]] || [[word:fathadhaj|fathadhaj]] || [[word:fathadhash|fathadhash]] || [[word:fathadha|fathadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fathadhathal|fathadhathal]] || [[word:fathadhajal|fathadhajal]] || [[word:fathadhashal|fathadhashal]] || [[word:fathadhakal|fathadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fathadhathatha|fathadhathatha]] || [[word:fathadhajaja|fathadhajaja]] || [[word:fathadhashasha|fathadhashasha]] || [[word:fathadhaka|fathadhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fathadhathan|fathadhathan]] || [[word:fathadhajan|fathadhajan]] || [[word:fathadhashan|fathadhashan]] || [[word:fathadhakan|fathadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fathadhathaoro|fathadhathaoro]] || [[word:fathadhajaoro|fathadhajaoro]] || [[word:fathadhashaoro|fathadhashaoro]] || [[word:fathadhakaoro|fathadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
